name: cabinet-walid-araqi
description: Cabinet Walid Araqi legal case management application
author: Cabinet Walid Araqi

scripts.build:mac: npm run sync:web-assets && npm run verify:web-assets && electron-builder --mac --x64
scripts.build:win: npm run sync:web-assets && npm run verify:web-assets && electron-builder --win portable --x64
scripts.build:win:portable: npm run sync:web-assets && npm run verify:web-assets && electron-builder --win portable --x64
